Variables.Name: Preview
Variables.Description: Used for previewing when editing the function, or when bUsePreviewValueAsDefault is enabled.

Variables.Name: InputName
Variables.Description: The input's name, which will be drawn on the connector in function call expressions that use this function.

Variables.Name: Description
Variables.Description: The input's description, which will be used as a tooltip on the connector in function call expressions that use this function.

Variables.Name: Id
Variables.Description: Id of this input, used to maintain references through name changes.

Variables.Name: InputType
Variables.Description:
Type of this input.  
	  Input code chunks will be cast to this type, and a compiler error will be emitted if the cast fails.

Variables.Name: PreviewValue
Variables.Description: Value used to preview this input when editing the material function.

Variables.Name: bUsePreviewValueAsDefault
Variables.Description: Whether to use the preview value or texture as the default value for this input.

Variables.Name: SortPriority
Variables.Description: Controls where the input is displayed relative to the other inputs.

Variables.Name: bCompilingFunctionPreview
Variables.Description:
true when this expression is being compiled in a function preview, 
	  false when this expression is being compiled into a material that uses the function.
	  Only valid in Compile()
